description: A petty-cash allotment held by a buyer/handler for local on-the-spot purchases that run with no PO. A cash buy deducts the price from the balance and a cash-purchase GRN is raised with no PO reference; when the balance falls to about one third of the allotment a maker/checker-approved reimbursement tops it back to the ceiling. Cash spend is tagged and reported alongside credit spend. Source: AB local-purchase cash branch.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Float Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key for the float so every cash buy, deduction, reimbursement, and top-up posts against one float record and the cash spend trail is auditable.

fields.name: handlerId
fields.label: Cash Handler
fields.validation: the buyer/handler who holds and spends the float; one active float per handler
fields.purpose: Names the person responsible for the petty cash so deductions, the reimbursement destination (cash handler, not a supplier), and accountability for the float all attribute to one holder.

fields.name: floatAmount
fields.label: Float Allotment
fields.validation: > 0; configurable per tenant/buyer (example OMR 300); the ceiling reimbursement restores the balance to
fields.purpose: The configured ceiling of the petty-cash allotment; the top-up target on reimbursement and the basis of the low-water threshold. Defaulted to 300 in the float's currency but configurable per handler.

fields.name: balance
fields.label: Current Balance
fields.validation: >= 0; deducted by the cash price on each cash buy; restored to floatAmount on top-up; a buy is allowed only when cashPrice <= balance
fields.computedFormula: floatAmount - SUM(cash buys since last top-up) (restored to floatAmount on reimbursement)
fields.purpose: The cash on hand right now; gates whether a cash buy can proceed (cashPrice <= balance), drives the low-water reimbursement trigger, and is restored to the ceiling at top-up.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; the cash spend is normalized to base for unified cash-vs-credit reporting
fields.purpose: The currency the float is held and spent in (commonly OMR for local Oman buys); the base-currency sibling lets cash spend be reported alongside credit spend in one comparable view (axiom A12).

fields.name: reimbursementThreshold
fields.label: Reimbursement Threshold
fields.validation: default about one third of floatAmount (example OMR 100 of a 300 allotment); configurable; the float is low when balance <= reimbursementThreshold
fields.purpose: The low-water mark that triggers a reimbursement request: when the balance falls to or below it the buyer requests a top-up so the float never runs dry mid-purchase. Default about a third of the allotment, configurable.

fields.name: cashGrnNoPoRef
fields.label: Cash GRN (No PO)
fields.validation: true: a cash buy raises a cash-purchase GoodsReceipt with poId = null (the defining difference from a credit GRN); QC applies if the item requires it
fields.purpose: Marks that goods bought on this float are received via a cash GRN carrying no PO reference (poId = null), the structural marker of the no-PO cash branch; QC still applies the same hard block on QC-controlled items.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: INACTIVE float cannot be spent against; only ACTIVE floats accept cash buys and reimbursements
fields.purpose: Lets an admin retire a handler's float (handler change, audit hold) without deleting its spend history.

fields.name: lastReimbursedAt
fields.label: Last Reimbursed At
fields.validation: set on each top-up; the reimbursement sums vouchers since this point
fields.purpose: Timestamps the last top-up so the next reimbursement reconciles the vouchers accumulated since it, and the float ledger can be audited per top-up cycle.

invariants: cash branch is local only; a cash buy has no PO (cash GRN poId = null)
buy allowed only when cashPrice <= balance; low-water at balance <= reimbursementThreshold (~1/3 of allotment)
A6 maker != checker on the reimbursement (financial-control SoD)
reimbursement restores balance to floatAmount; cash spend tagged and reported alongside credit (A12)
